case_title: DANNA JANETH DIAZ NINO VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DANNA JANETH DIAZ NINO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RANDOLF NIXON (MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR) AND ALEXIS ROBBINS (GENERAL MANAGER). NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO NOV-08-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NINO, DANNA JANETH DIAZ AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
